content:
About

Osborne Metalworks is a one-person silversmithing studio in Gallup, New Mexico. Every cuff, bolo tie and buckle is made by hand.
title: About

content:
Contact

Questions about a piece or a commission? Reach the studio at sam.osborne@Finthesiss.ai
title: Contact

content:
Pricing

Prices reflect the silver, the stone and the hours at the bench. Custom work is quoted per piece.
title: Pricing

content:
The Studio

A small bench, a few stamps and a polishing wheel in Gallup. This is where the work happens.
title: The Studio

content:
Commissions

Have a piece in mind? Commissions start with a sketch and a deposit. Lead times run a few weeks.
title: Commissions

content:
Galleries & Fairs

Where to find Osborne Metalworks in person, including the Gallup Arts and Crafts Fair.
title: Galleries & Fairs

content:
Materials

Solid sterling silver, with turquoise, coral, lapis and spiny oyster set by hand.
title: Materials

content:
Care & Cleaning

How to clean silver and look after soft stones like turquoise and coral at home.
title: Care & Cleaning

content:
Shipping

Insured shipping with tracking within the continental US. Most orders go out within a week.
title: Shipping

content:
Returns

Returns on stock pieces within 30 days in original condition. Custom work is final.
title: Returns

content:
FAQ

Common questions about sizing, stones, commissions and shipping.
title: FAQ

content:
Sizing

How to measure your wrist for a cuff and your finger for a ring.
title: Sizing

content:
Lapidary

Notes on stone cutting and the lapidary work behind each cabochon.
title: Lapidary

content:
Wholesale

Gallery and stockist enquiries are welcome. Reach out for terms and lead times.
title: Wholesale

content:
Warranty

Each piece is guaranteed against fault in materials and workmanship.
title: Warranty

content:
Gift Cards

Gift cards are available in any amount and never expire.
title: Gift Cards

content:
Stockists

Galleries that carry Osborne Metalworks, including the Turquoise Trail gallery.
title: Stockists

content:
Repairs

Resizing, stone resets and repairs on existing pieces. Send a photo to start.
title: Repairs

content:
Stones & Sourcing

Where the turquoise, coral, lapis and spiny oyster come from and how they are graded.
title: Stones & Sourcing

content:
Privacy

How Osborne Metalworks handles your order and contact details.
title: Privacy
